calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-05-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
Martin M. Titcomb, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Raymond Totah
John Cesari, Esq. on behalf of defendant Charles Bizbee

Parties indicated that this matter had settled. Terms of the settlement were as follows:
Defendant Charles Bizbee to pay plaintiff Raymond Totah $2,500.00. $600.00 in sanctions were waived. A General release, and dismissal with prejudice. Each side to bear its own costs. All parties agreed to the terms of the settlement.

Hon. Robert Dondero; Clerks: A. Huie/V. Mu Reporter: J. Bryce, #3321 (206)
